final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a dreamy underwater world with a mermaid, glowing jellyfish, and sunken treasure (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "梦幻童话风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Studio Ghibli underwater fantasy illustration, 1990s Hans Christian Andersen fairy-tale picture-book art, Disney The Little Mermaid concept art era; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a layered depth composition with light rays descending from the surface — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include:
  - a mermaid swimming among coral reefs
  - glowing jellyfish
  - sunken ship with treasure
  - coral reef environment
Scene/backdrop: must include an underwater world with light rays penetrating from the ocean surface above
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamlike, luminous atmosphere with light shafts from above — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a kaleidoscopic, dream-like direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a painterly illustration surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
